completion_summary: Added converged and warnings properties plus serialized status for sequential precipitation hooks; max_passes exhaustion now reports explicit max_passes_reached rather than an ambiguous result. Added multi-spec and capped-pass tests. Tests: equilibrium chemistry suite 18 passed; Ruff and mypy passed; claim check passed. Reference evidence: ChemWorld solubility-product and material-balance contracts; no external implementation copied. Known limitation: hooks remain sequential binary Ksp slices, not a simultaneous multiphase activity model; that requires a future WF-90 claim and independent reference backend. Final implementation commit: 34d2b95.
notes: WF-00 contracts and role boundaries are complete. Physchem-only reference slice; no task/scenario/observation/scoring/runtime registry/benchmark/golden changes.
scope: WF-10 make multi-hook precipitation convergence and max-pass failure diagnostics explicit without changing frozen equilibrium task/runtime contracts
